rule_name: Persistence - Windows Registry Run Key Modification
search_query: index=windows source="XmlWinEventLog:Microsoft-Windows-Sysmon/Operational" EventCode=13 (TargetObject="*\\CurrentVersion\\Run*" OR TargetObject="*\\CurrentVersion\\RunOnce*") | table _time, Computer, User, Image, TargetObject, Details | rename Image as "Source_Process", Details as "Payload_Path"
description: Detects modifications to Windows Registry Run or RunOnce keys. Attackers use these keys to ensure their malicious payloads execute automatically at system startup or user logon.
